mapper.sql: guest_id, name, phone, id_card, open_id, is_delete, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guest (name, phone, id_card, open_id, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{openId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM guest WHERE guest_id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT FROM guest WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT FROM guest WHERE open_id = #{openId} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE guest SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, id_card = #{idCard}, open_id = #{openId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE guest_id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE guest SET is_delete = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE guest_id = #{id}
